description: Summarize Gong call transcripts into short summaries + action items using an OpenAI-compatible LLM.

outputs.description: Upstream DataFrame enriched with summary and action_items columns

asset_name.label: Asset Name
asset_name.description: Name of the asset to create

upstream_asset_key.label: Upstream Asset Key
upstream_asset_key.description: Upstream asset key providing a DataFrame with a transcript column

llm_provider.label: LLM Provider
llm_provider.description: LLM provider. Currently supports 'openai' and OpenAI-compatible endpoints via base_url.

model.label: Model
model.description: Model identifier passed to the provider

api_key_env_var.label: API Key Env Var
api_key_env_var.description: Env var holding the LLM provider API key

base_url.label: Base URL
base_url.description: Override the OpenAI-compatible base URL (Azure OpenAI, LiteLLM, local vLLM, etc.)

transcript_column.label: Transcript Column
transcript_column.description: Name of the column containing the flattened transcript text

summary_column.label: Summary Column
summary_column.description: Name of the output column to write the summary text into

action_items_column.label: Action Items Column
action_items_column.description: Name of the output column to write the action items list into

skip_empty.label: Skip Empty
skip_empty.description: If true, rows with empty transcript are skipped (empty outputs).

name: Gong Call Summary Asset
